name: financial-intel
description: Multi-signal financial intelligence on a crypto asset, token, or equity ticker — fuses spot price + token market data + macro/equities + on-chain smart-money + fundamentals/funding + market news into one brief, paid per call across three rails (direct nanopayment + MPP + x402 on Base) via selat-pay (USDC via Circle Gateway).

symbol.description: Token symbol (no $) for the Alchemy spot-price lookup (used as ${symbol}).

coin.description: CoinGecko coin id (lowercase slug) for token market data (used as ${coin}).

ticker.description: Equity ticker for the Alpha Vantage global-quote macro/equities pull (used as ${ticker}).

chain.description: Chain name for the Nansen smart-money holdings query (used as ${chain}).

query.description: Free-text search for the Exa market-news/context step (used as ${query}).

steps.label: spot price — Alchemy (direct nanopayment, Circle Gateway-batched)
token market data — CoinGecko coins-markets (routed MPP via SELAT Router)
equities / macro quote — Alpha Vantage global-quote (routed MPP via SELAT Router)
on-chain smart-money holdings — Nansen (routed MPP via SELAT Router)
fundamentals / funding rounds — Messari (routed x402 on Base via SELAT Router)
market news / context — Exa search (routed x402 on Base via SELAT Router)
